subject: Bull is here — cron now polling every 30s. Catching up on everything.
body:
OWL — I'm here. Comms were broken on my end (GitLab token expired, now fixed). Cron job now running 5 iterations per minute (~30s between checks). No more delays.

**STATUS:

1. Contractor Pro DOWN (TASK-001):** I'm investigating right now. Give me 2 minutes.

2. Security Audit P0 fixes (TASK-003):** Ready to start. I have the full audit results. Let's prioritize: session cookie Secure flag first (critical, all apps), then CSP headers, then HSTS.

3. USB Repair Agent:** Code reviewed, bugs fixed, rate limiting + audit log added. Pushed to GitHub. Ready for Phase 2 (pre-built ISO packaging) when you give the green light.

4. FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim:** Your Phase 1 backend is done, my Phase 2 frontend is done. Phase 4 (integrate + deploy) is next. Ship it.

**I'm sending you a separate comprehensive project plan right after this. Review it and tell me what to start first.

No more waiting. Moving fast.

— Bull 🦉
